name: Mind Lash
description: In the hands of any creature other than a {@creature mind flayer}, a mind lash functions as a normal whip. In the hands of an illithid, this magic weapon strips away a creature's will to survive as it also strips away flesh, dealing an extra {@damage 2d4} psychic damage to any target it hits. Any creature that takes psychic damage from the mind lash must also succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws for 1 minute.
